doc: Normalize (lowercase + strip ALL whitespace) the probe output and each signature, then: ok if any successSignature present; else fail if any failSignature; else unknown. SUCCESS-WINS — the agy keyring transient ('not logged into Antigravity' FOLLOWED BY a success marker) is ok (not a logout), which also locks the ProcessTranslator false-AuthFail fix. Whitespace stripping defeats the codex 'not logged in' ⊄ 'logged in using' substring trap and compact-vs-pretty JSON.

cases.name: codex not-logged-in (substring trap)
cases.text: You are not logged in. Run codex login.

cases.name: agy transient-then-success (regression)
cases.text:
keyringAuth: timed out after 1s, skipping keyring auth
You are not logged into Antigravity
ChainedAuth: authenticated via keyring
OAuth: authenticated successfully as surebeli@gmail.com

cases.name: agy persistent fail
cases.text: You are not logged into Antigravity

cases.name: agy hostname cloudcode-pa is NOT auth (connection target logged before token validation, not a success marker)
cases.text:
Connecting to cloudcode-pa.googleapis.com
You are not logged into Antigravity
HTTP 401 Unauthorized

cases.name: opencode authed (fail-wins): '2 credentials' => ok
cases.text:
DeepSeek api
Xiaomi Token Plan (China) api
2 credentials

cases.name: opencode not-configured (fail-wins): '0 credentials' contains 'credentials' but means NOT authed => fail
